step_rationale: Ether-linked lysophospholipid; bioactive component of dense LDL.
mechanism: Lysoalkylphosphatidylcholine is a pro-inflammatory lipid mediator in dense LDL promoting vascular inflammation.

references.title: LDL subclass lipidomics in atherogenic dyslipidemia: effect of statin therapy on bioactive lipids and dense LDL.
